title: AI Integration Engineer, AI/ML
company_focus:
Social-first ecosystems for brand marketing and influencer
marketing
description:
At Viral Nation, we specialize in building social-first
ecosystems for brands to connect with the modern consumer
journey. Our integrated solutions align strategy, talent,
media, and technology with culturally relevant creativity to
scale the world’s fastest-growing digital brands. Viral
Nation offers a fluid, creative, and growth-oriented
environment that will support your ambitions to apply your
talents in an open, collaborative, and fast-paced culture.
Our ability to stay at the forefront of the industry has
fuelled our success and will guide us in paving the path
forward. We’re driven to push boundaries and think beyond
today to deliver strategies, and we’re just getting started.

While we continuously exceed our goals, we need your help –
our success is only as great as our people. Strong
performance leads to high expectations, and we must keep
raising the bar!

Viral Nation is seeking an AI Integration Engineer, AI/ML to
serve as the primary technical engine translating high-level
architectural visions into production-ready reality.
Reporting directly to the Principal Architect, AI/ML and VP
of Engineering, you will be responsible for the hands-on
development, integration, and deployment of AI/ML models and
agentic workflows within our GCP ecosystem.

What You'll Do Here:

- You will transform the Principal Architect’s reference
  architectures into scalable, deployable code using Python,
  GKE, and Cloud Run.
- Your primary focus involves building out agentic ecosystems
  using Google ADK (Agent Development Kit) and Model Context
  Protocol (MCP), specifically focusing on the Agent-to-
  Agent (A2A) orchestration patterns defined by the
  Architect.
- You will apply advanced prompt engineering and context
  engineering techniques to optimize LLM performance,
  ensuring agents maintain state and accuracy over long
  interactions.
- You will develop and tune high-fidelity RAG pipelines using
  the Google RAG Engine and Agent Engine to ensure agents
  have the precise context required for influencer marketing
  workflows.
- The role requires applying machine learning techniques to
  our massive datasets to implement automated anomaly
  detection, forecasting, and trend analysis.
- You will perform advanced data science and analysis by
  generating and querying high-dimensional video and text
  embeddings to extract insights from social media content.
- You will integrate Gemini and Model Garden LLMs into
  production applications while managing the technical
  nuances of token limits and context window optimization.
- Partnering with the Architect, you will implement MLOps
  practices that track agent performance, cost-efficiency,
  and ethical AI safeguards within the GCP IAM framework.

What You'll Need To Have:

- Advanced proficiency in Python is required for AI/ML backend
  development, data analysis, and API construction.
- You must possess a deep understanding of prompt engineering
  strategies (Chain-of-Thought, ReAct) and context
  engineering to maximize model reasoning capabilities.
- The position demands deep hands-on experience with Google
  ADK, MCP, Vertex AI Pipelines, and the Google RAG Engine.
- You should have practical experience applying classical ML
  algorithms for regression, forecasting, and anomaly
  detection on large-scale datasets.
- The role requires a strong understanding of vector databases
  and the manipulation of video/text embeddings for semantic
  search and classification.
- Deep experience with utilizing GitHub Actions to support the
  SDLC workflows and CI/CD standards established by the
  Principal Architect.

Nice To Haves

- Experience utilizing Snowflake Cortex Analyst, Cortex
  Search, and Snowflake Intelligence ecosystem.
- Proficiency in Node.js for full-stack integration layer and
  tool development is highly regarded.
- Prior experience in the digital marketing or influencer
  marketing space is a significant advantage.
- Experience with containerization and orchestration using
  Docker and GKE will help scale our autonomous systems.

Compensation Philosophy:

At Viral Nation, compensation is structured, performance-
led, and market-aligned. Pay decisions are intentional,
based on role requirements, performance, and market
alignment by country, and are set to maintain internal pay
equity across comparable roles and levels.

Compensation progression is tied to demonstrated
performance, expanded scope, and sustained contribution over
time, not tenure alone. Employee compensation is reviewed
regularly through formal performance reviews and check-ins
to ensure alignment with role expectations and impact.



AI in Recruitment:



Viral Nation does not use AI-enabled tools to screen,
assess, rank, or select candidates in our recruitment
process. Our hiring teams make all hiring decisions.

DEI Commitment:

Viral Nation is committed to diversity, equity and inclusion
in our agency. Viral Nation welcomes applications from
people with visible and non-visible disabilities.
Accommodations are available on request for candidates
taking part in all aspects of the recruiting and selection
process.
responsibilities: Transform reference architectures into scalable, deployable code using Python, GKE, and Cloud Run
Build agentic ecosystems using Google ADK and Model Context Protocol (MCP) with Agent-to-Agent orchestration patterns
Apply advanced prompt engineering and context engineering techniques to optimize LLM performance
Develop and tune high-fidelity RAG pipelines using Google RAG Engine and Agent Engine for influencer marketing workflows
Apply machine learning techniques for automated anomaly detection, forecasting, and trend analysis on large datasets
Generate and query high-dimensional video and text embeddings to extract insights from social media content
Integrate Gemini and Model Garden LLMs into production applications with token limit and context window optimization
Implement MLOps practices to track agent performance, cost-efficiency, and ethical AI safeguards
use_cases: Social media content analysis and insights extraction
Automated anomaly detection in marketing data
Semantic search and classification of video and text content
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on development and deployment of
AI/ML models, agentic workflows, and RAG pipelines. The
engineer will build agent ecosystems using Google ADK/MCP,
implement LLM integrations with Gemini, and develop RAG
pipelines - all core AI/ML implementation work, not support
functions.
